hero.badge_text: Blink Marketplace is live in Algiers
hero.subtitle: Book a ride, send a package, or shop the marketplace — all from one app. Built for everyday life across Algeria.

services.title: One app for everything you need to move.
services.subtitle: From your morning commute to the late-night grocery run — Blink connects the dots. Pick a service and tap go.
services.rides_title: Rides across the city — fair prices, no surprises.
services.rides_desc: Match with verified drivers in seconds. See the price up front. Pay in cash or in-app.
services.marketplace_desc: Order from your favorite restaurants, pharmacies, and stores. Delivered hot, fast, and tracked.
services.courier_desc: Send anything across town — documents, gifts, forgotten keys. Live tracking from pickup to drop.
services.promos_desc: Fresh student deals, weekend drops, partner offers. Stack discounts at checkout, automatically.
services.support_desc: Real humans, fast replies. Chat in Arabic, French, or English — whichever feels right.

steps.title: Three taps. You're moving.
steps.subtitle: No accounts to wrestle, no surprise prices. Blink keeps it simple — open, pick, go.
steps.step1_desc: Sign in with your phone number. We text you a one-time code in under five seconds.
steps.step2_desc: Rides, marketplace, or courier — every option lives one screen away from the home page.
steps.step3_desc: Watch your driver or order in real time. Tap to share, rate, or rebook in a single tap.

features.title: Built for the way Algeria actually moves.
features.subtitle: Local-first design. Cash or card. Arabic, French, English. The details that make daily life work.
features.tracking_title: See your ride approach the corner — in real time.
features.tracking_desc: Every Blink trip and order has a live map, an ETA you can trust, and a driver you can call.
features.market_desc: Restaurants, pharmacies, groceries — order from the spots you already love.
features.pay_desc: Cash, card, or in-app balance. Top up once, ride for the week. Receipts saved automatically.
features.safety_title: Designed with you and your family in mind.
features.safety_desc: Verified drivers, trip sharing, and a panic button that's one tap away — every single ride.

drivers.title: Be your own boss.
drivers.desc: Sign up online, complete a quick verification, and start earning the same week. Cash out anytime — no minimum threshold.

download.title: Download Blink. Move your life.
download.desc: Available on iOS and Android. Free, in three languages, with you wherever you go in Algeria.
download.scan_hint: Point your camera at the code

footer.tagline: Your city, in a blink. Rides, deliveries, and marketplace — built for Algeria.

auth.title: Blink Dashboard
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your admin account
